title: 宝塚記念の後に・『つまんない』

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky loses at the Takarazuka Kinen. Having
maximized her resourcefulness to no avail, she
can feel the reality of her limitations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's bitter toward her rivals, who are already
gearing themselves up for the next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All of this has become so played out, she
complains—or is something else on her mind?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She heeds King Halo's directive and decides to
run in the autumn Tenno Sho next. An uneasy
summer begins...
